chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1968 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.9721/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.9722/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.9723/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 15.05.2025 Mr. Uzair Qadir Shoro, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Learned DAG, Ms. Alizeh Bashir, waives notice of this petition. Petitioner’s counsel submits that the controversy as raised in this matter regarding inter-corporate dividend already stands decided by a judgment reported as 2024 PTD 49 [International Brands Limited vs. Federation of Pakistan & Others], whereby the petition has been dismissed. In view of this position, instant petition is also dismissed for the reasons so assigned in the aforesaid judgment. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
